name: Repo

task.description: Build a code-hosting repository page (GitHub-style) for 'acme/querykit' at 1920px wide. Top: a repo header with owner/name breadcrumb, a description, and a row of three stat buttons (Star 1.2k, Fork 184, Watch 56). Below, a two-column layout: LEFT (main, ~70%) a file-browser toolbar ('main' branch selector, '12 commits' link) above a file list table with at least 7 rows (mix of folders and files: src/, tests/, README.md, package.json, LICENSE, .gitignore, tsconfig.json) each with name, last-commit message, and relative time; below the file list a rendered README card with an H1 and a paragraph. RIGHT (sidebar, ~30%) an 'About' panel with the description, a topics row of 4 tag chips, and a 'Releases' line; below it a language bar (a thin horizontal stacked bar) with a legend (TypeScript 78%, CSS 14%, JavaScript 8%). Responsive: at 375px the sidebar drops below the main column (single column).
requirements: A repo header shows the owner/name breadcrumb, a description, and three stat buttons (Star 1.2k, Fork 184, Watch 56)
The main column is roughly 70% width and the About sidebar roughly 30%, side by side and top-aligned
A file-list table shows at least 7 rows, each with a name, a last-commit message, and a relative time
Folder rows are visually distinguishable from file rows (icon or style)
A README card below the file list shows an H1 heading and a paragraph
The About sidebar shows the description, exactly four topic chips, and a Releases line
A stacked language bar appears with a legend listing TypeScript 78%, CSS 14%, JavaScript 8%
The language-bar segment widths are proportional to the listed percentages
On desktop nothing overflows horizontally; file-list cells are not clipped
At 375px the About sidebar moves below the main column (single column layout)
The accent color is consistent across links, chips, and the active branch selector

ss_html:
acme / querykit
A powerful TypeScript query builder for modern applications
⭐ Star 1.2k 🍴 Fork 184 👁 Watch 56
12 commits
Name Last commit message Last commit date
📁 src/
Add query optimization features 2 days ago
📁 tests/
Update test coverage for new features 3 days ago
📄 README.md
Update documentation with examples 5 days ago
📄 package.json
Bump version to 2.1.0 1 week ago
📄 LICENSE
Initial commit 6 months ago
📄 .gitignore
Add build artifacts to gitignore 2 weeks ago
📄 tsconfig.json
Configure TypeScript strict mode 3 weeks ago

QueryKit

QueryKit is a modern, type-safe query builder for TypeScript applications. It provides an intuitive API for building complex database queries while maintaining full type safety and excellent performance. Whether you're working with SQL databases or NoSQL solutions, QueryKit adapts to your needs with its flexible architecture and comprehensive feature set.

About

A powerful TypeScript query builder for modern applications

typescript database query-builder orm
📦 Releases • Latest: v2.1.0

Languages

TypeScript 78.2%
CSS 13.8%
JavaScript 8.0%

- Typography: System fonts
- Layout: Two-column flex layout with 70/30 split

2. Repo header: breadcrumb, description, stat buttons

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>acme/querykit — A powerful, type-safe query builder for TypeScript</title>
  <style>
    /* ── RESET & BASE ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    body {
      font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'Noto Sans',
                   Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
      font-size: 14px;
      line-height: 1.5;
      color: #1f2328;
      background: #f6f8fa;
      min-width: 320px;
    }

    a { color: #2563eb; text-decoration: none; }
    a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

    /* ── ACCENT COLOUR TOKEN ─────────────────────────────────────── */
    /* accent: #2563eb  (blue)  used for links, chips, active selectors */

    /* ── TOP NAV ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .top-nav {
      background: #161b22;
      padding: 12px 40px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 28px;
    }
    .top-nav .logo {
      font-size: 20px;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: #fff;
      letter-spacing: -0.5px;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .top-nav .logo em { color: #2563eb; font-style: normal; }
    .top-nav-links {
      display: flex;
      gap: 20px;
      list-style: none;
    }
    .top-nav-links a {
      color: #cdd9e5;
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 500;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .top-nav-links a:hover { color: #fff; text-decoration: none; }
    .nav-search {
      margin-left: auto;
      background: #21262d;
      border: 1px solid #30363d;
      border-radius: 6px;
      padding: 5px 14px;
      color: #8b949e;
      font-size: 13px;
      width: 260px;
    }
    .nav-avatar {
      width: 30px; height: 30px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: #2563eb;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      color: #fff;
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 12px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    /* ── PAGE WRAPPER ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .page-wrapper {
      max-width: 1280px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 28px 40px 60px;
    }

    /* ── REPO HEADER ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .repo-header {
      padding-bottom: 20px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #d0d7de;
      margin-bottom: 18px;
    }
    .breadcrumb {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .breadcrumb .bc-icon {
      color: #636c76;
      font-size: 18px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .breadcrumb .bc-owner {
      font-size: 20px;
      font-weight: 500;
      color: #2563eb;
    }
    .breadcrumb .bc-sep {
      font-size: 22px;
      font-weight: 300;
      color: #636c76;
      line-height: 1;
    }
    .breadcrumb .bc-repo {
      font-size: 20px;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: #2563eb;
    }
    .repo-desc-header {
      font-size: 15px;
      color: #636c76;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      max-width: 860px;
    }
    .stat-buttons {
      display: flex;
      gap: 8px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .stat-btn {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      border: 1px solid #d0d7de;
      border-radius: 6px;
      background: #f6f8fa;
      padding: 5px 14px;
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 500;
      color: #1f2328;
      cursor: pointer;
      white-space: nowrap;
      transition: background 0.15s;
      text-decoration: none;
    }
    .stat-btn:hover { background: #e8ebf0; color: #1f2328; text-decoration: none; }
    .stat-btn .sbi { font-size: 15px; color: #636c76; }
    .stat-btn .sbc {
      background: #dce1e7;
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 0 8px;
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: #1f2328;
    }
    .stat-btn.star-btn .sbi { color: #b58a00; }

    /* ── REPO TABS ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .repo-tabs {
      display: flex;
      gap: 0;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #d0d7de;
      margin-bottom: 22px;
      overflow-x: auto;
    }
    .repo-tab {
      padding: 8px 16px;
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 500;
      color: #636c76;
      cursor: pointer;
      border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .repo-tab.active {
      color: #1f2328;
      font-weight: 600;
      border-bottom-color: #fd8c73;
    }
    .repo-tab .tc {
      background: #e6edf3;
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 0 7px;
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: #1f2328;
    }

    /* ── TWO-COLUMN LAYOUT ───────────────────────────────────────── */
    .repo-body {
      display: flex;
      gap: 24px;
      align-items: flex-start;
    }
    .main-col {
      flex: 0 0 calc(70% - 12px);
      min-width: 0;
    }
    .sidebar-col {
      flex: 0 0 calc(30% - 12px);
      min-width: 0;
    }

    /* ── FILE BROWSER ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .file-browser {
      border: 1px solid #d0d7de;
      border-radius: 8px;
      overflow: hidden;
      background: #fff;
      margin-bottom: 18px;
    }
    .file-toolbar {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      padding: 10px 14px;
      background: #f6f8fa;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #d0d7de;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .branch-selector {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      border: 1px solid #d0d7de;
      border-radius: 6px;
      background: #fff;
      padding: 5px 12px;
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: #1f2328;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: background 0.15s;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .branch-selector:hover { background: #eef1f5; }
    .branch-selector .bs-icon { color: #2563eb; font-size: 15px; }
    .branch-selector .bs-chevron { color: #636c76; font-size: 10px; }
    .toolbar-spacer { flex: 1; min-width: 8px; }
    .commits-link {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 5px;
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 500;
      color: #2563eb;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .commits-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
    .commits-link .cl-icon { color: #636c76; font-size: 14px; }

    /* ── FILE TABLE ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .file-table {
      width: 100%;
      border-collapse: collapse;
      table-layout: fixed;
    }
    .file-table tr {
      border-bottom: 1px solid #d0d7de;
    }
    .file-table tr:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
    .file-table tbody tr:hover { background: #f6f8fa; }

    .file-table td {
      padding: 8px 14px;
      vertical-align: middle;
      overflow: hidden;
      text-overflow: ellipsis;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .ft-name  { width: 26%; }
    .ft-msg   { width: 54%; color: #636c76; font-size: 13px; }
    .ft-time  { width: 20%; color: #636c76; font-size: 13px; text-align: right; }

    .file-link {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 7px;
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 500;
      color: #1f2328;
      max-width: 100%;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .file-link:hover { color: #2563eb; text-decoration: none; }
    .file-link:hover .fl-name { text-decoration: underline; }
    .fl-icon { font-size: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .fl-icon.folder  { color: #54aeff; }
    .fl-icon.file    { color: #8b949e; }
    .fl-icon.config  { color: #d29922; }
    .fl-icon.md      { color: #388bfd; }
    .fl-name { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }

    .commit-link {
      color: #636c76;
      font-size: 13px;
      overflow: hidden;
      text-overflow: ellipsis;
      white-space: nowrap;
      display: block;
    }
    .commit-link:hover { color: #2563eb; text-decoration: underline; }

    /* ── README CARD ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .readme-card {
      border: 1px solid #d0d7de;
      border-radius: 8px;
      overflow: hidden;
      background: #fff;
    }
    .readme-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      padding: 10px 16px;
      background: #f6f8fa;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #d0d7de;
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: #1f2328;
    }
    .readme-header .rh-icon { font-size: 15px; color: #636c76; }
    .readme-body {
      padding: 28px 36px 32px;
    }
    .readme-body h1 {
      font-size: 28px;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: #1f2328;
      margin-bottom: 14px;
      padding-bottom: 12px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #d0d7de;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .readme-badge {
      display: inline-block;
      border-radius: 4px;
      padding: 3px 10px;
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.3px;
    }
    .rb-blue   { background: #2563eb; color: #fff; }
    .rb-green  { background: #16a34a; color: #fff; }
    .rb-orange { background: #d97706; color: #fff; }
    .readme-body p {
      font-size: 15px;
      line-height: 1.75;
      color: #1f2328;
      margin-bottom: 14px;
    }
    .readme-body p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
    .readme-body code {
      background: #eff1f3;
      border-radius: 4px;
      padding: 2px 6px;
      font-size: 13px;
      font-family: 'SFMono-Regular', Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', Menlo, monospace;
      color: #b5366e;
    }
    .readme-body strong { font-weight: 700; }

    /* ── SIDEBAR — ABOUT PANEL ───────────────────────────────────── */
    .about-panel {
      border: 1px solid #d0d7de;
      border-radius: 8px;
      background: #fff;
      padding: 20px;
      margin-bottom: 18px;
    }
    .about-panel h3 {
      font-size: 16px;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: #1f2328;
      margin-bottom: 14px;
    }
    .about-desc {
      font-size: 14px;
      color: #1f2328;
      line-height: 1.65;
      margin-bottom: 14px;
    }
    .topics {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 6px;
      margin-bottom: 18px;
    }
    .topic-chip {
      display: inline-block;
      background: #dbeafe;
      color: #2563eb;
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 4px 13px;
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 600;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: background 0.15s;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .topic-chip:hover { background: #bfdbfe; color: #1d4ed8; text-decoration: none; }
    .about-divider {
      border: none;
      border-top: 1px solid #d0d7de;
      margin: 14px 0;
    }
    .about-row {
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-start;
      gap: 9px;
      font-si

  3. [MINOR] File list shows only 6 rows instead of the required minimum of 7 rows (at center main column)

Suggested fixes:
  1. Add a fourth topic chip to the About sidebar (e.g., 'database' which appears to be mentioned in the content)
  2. Adjust the language bar segment widths to be proportional - TypeScript at 78% should take up roughly 3/4 of the bar width
  3. Add one more file/folder row to the file list to meet the minimum requirement of 7 rows

    .repo-tabs {
      display: flex;
      gap: 0;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #d0d7de;
      margin-bottom: 22px;
      overflow-x: auto;
    }
    .repo-tab {
      padding: 8px 16px;
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 500;
      color: #636c76;
      cursor: pointer;
      border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .repo-tab.active {
      color: #1f2328;
      font-weight: 600;
      border-bottom-color: #fd8c73;
    }
    .repo-tab .tc {
      background: #e6edf3;
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 0 7px;
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: #1f2328;
    }

    /* ── TWO-COLUMN LAYOUT ───────────────────────────────────────── */
    .repo-body {
      display: flex;
      gap: 24px;
      align-items: flex-start;
    }
    .main-col {
      flex: 0 0 calc(70% - 12px);
      min-width: 0;
    }
    .sidebar-col {
      flex: 0 0 calc(30% - 12px);
      min-width: 0;
    }

    /* ── FILE BROWSER ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .file-browser {
      border: 1px solid #d0d7de;

      overflow: hidden;

      margin-bottom: 18px;

    .file-toolbar {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;

      background: #f6f8fa;

      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .branch-selector {

      align-items: center;

      border: 1px solid #d0d7de;
      border-radius: 6px;
      background: #fff;
      padding: 5px 12px;
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: #1f2328;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: background 0.15s;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .branch-selector:hover { background: #eef1f5; }
    .branch-selector .bs-icon { color: #2563eb; font-size: 15px; }
    .branch-selector .bs-chevron { color: #636c76; font-size: 10px; }
    .toolbar-spacer { flex: 1; min-width: 8px; }
    .commits-link {
      display: inline-flex;

      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 500;
      color: #2563eb;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .commits-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
    .commits-link .cl-icon { color: #636c76; font-size: 14px; }

    /* ── FILE TABLE ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .file-table {
      width: 100%;
      border-collapse: collapse;
      table-layout: fixed;
    }
    .file-table tr {
      border-bottom: 1px solid #d0d7de;
    }
    .file-table tr:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
    .file-table tbody tr:hover { background: #f6f8fa; }

    .file-table td {
      padding: 8px 14px;

      text-overflow: ellipsis;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }

    .file-link {
